generated_evidence: Applicant organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
grant_use: Clarification responses and eligibility narrative where a company register fact is requested.
exclusions: Does not evidence Swiss partner commitment, budget, permits, export-control status, financial capacity, Project Impact, or award-term acceptance.
Companies House confirmation-statement risk must remain separately managed where relevant.

generated_evidence: Aureon evidence automation is supported by the local operator repository and public RA-CONSULTING GitHub organisation/repository pointers.
Use as software implementation and reproducible workflow evidence, not as proof of commercial traction or validated performance.
grant_use: Q8-Q16 narrative support for evidence architecture, audit trails, source-grounded claim controls, and reproducible workflow records.
Appendix and clarification support for the UK Aureon Evidence OS work package.
exclusions: Does not evidence partner site access, hardware/facility access, partner budget, customer adoption, or measurable performance without separate proof.

generated_evidence: ORCID, ResearchGate, Academia, and applicant-controlled public research page pointers support researcher identity and public dissemination footprint.
ResearchGate live readback was previously indexed as showing a public profile and publication catalogue; ORCID and Academia remain profile pointers where direct extraction was limited.
grant_use: Researcher identity, public dissemination, open-research routing, and capability narrative.
Supports Q10 team/resources and research-output context if framed with claim controls.
exclusions: Not independent peer review by itself.
Not IFS eligibility, finance, legal/export, partner, or award-terms evidence.

generated_evidence: Local AureonResearch inventory includes whitepapers, PDFs, DOCX files, markdown research notes, validation materials, and public/dissemination routes.
Selected research-output inventory indexed in this pack: 36 files.
Themes include HNC/coherence, EPAS/Project Druid, LIDAR, LuminaCell, validation, symbolic emergence, and related feasibility concepts.
grant_use: Narrative support for R&D capability, feasibility framing, validation plan, and dissemination footprint.
Use for Q8 need, Q9 approach, Q10 team/resources, Q12 outcomes, Q13 wider impacts, Q15 risks, and academic/partner outreach packs.
exclusions: Do not state proof of defence, energy, sensing, biomedical, or hardware capability unless independently validated.
Do not rely on internal papers to satisfy partner eligibility, export-control, permits/licences, budget, finance, or terms gates.

generated_evidence: Claim-class controls are available for class A verified software/company/portal/file evidence; class B public profile/open-source evidence; class C feasibility/prototype claims; and excluded internal/metaphorical language.
The evidence pack converts internal Aureon language into formal funder-safe phrasing and keeps unsupported claims out of grant answers.
grant_use: Use across all drafted sections and appendices to keep claims source-grounded and auditable.
Useful for review, resubmission, assessor clarification, and partner due-diligence responses.
exclusions: Claim controls do not create missing factual evidence.

funder_safe_text_blocks.text: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd is the UK applicant organisation, company number NI696693, with Gary Anthony Leckey as lead contact. This evidence supports applicant identity and governance context only; it does not evidence route-specific partner, budget, finance, permits, export-control, or award-term decisions.

Aureon Evidence OS is framed as a local-first evidence and workflow assurance layer for source inventories, claim-to-source mapping, reproducible records, risk tagging, partner review packs, and funder-ready audit trails.

The Aureon research corpus and public profile pointers support a research and dissemination footprint around HNC/coherence, evidence routing, validation planning, EPAS/Project Druid, LIDAR, LuminaCell, and related feasibility concepts. These outputs must be described as public research outputs, hypotheses, or feasibility material unless independently validated.

Formal grant language should use source-grounded evidence, measurable validation plans, human review gates, and risk controls. Avoid certainty claims, unsupported defence/energy/sensing claims, legal or tax advice, autonomous submission claims, and partner/customer claims without evidence.

This company/research evidence pack improves applicant capability and narrative support, but it does not unlock the live IFS UK-Switzerland submission gates for partner status, permits/licences, export licence, costs/value for money, finances, Project Impact, or award terms.

decision.why_no_route_unlock: Company metadata and research papers support applicant identity, capability, research/dissemination, and Q8-Q16 narrative, but do not supply Swiss partner, research institute/waiver, costs, finance, export, permit, Project Impact, partner-status, or award-term evidence.

controls: No plaintext passwords, tokens, private keys, bank data, raw ledgers, or tax records were copied into this pack.
No IFS portal mutation, upload, partner invite, email send, contact-form submission, award-term acceptance, or final submission was performed.
Research papers are indexed as local/public research outputs and feasibility evidence, not independent validation unless a separate source proves that status.
Public profile evidence is used for identity, dissemination, and capability narrative only.
Missing legal/export/finance/partner/terms evidence remains explicitly gated.
